tasks.title: Setup Qdrant collection hvac_service_manuals
tasks.description: Create Qdrant collection with proper schema for HVAC service manuals. Include metadata filters: brand, btu_range, type, technology, compressor_type, refrigerant, error_code.

subtasks.title: Add metadata field types: brand, btu_value, type, technology, compressor_type, refrigerant, error_code
Create named vectors for hybrid search
Add payload index for fast filtering

tasks.title: Implement HVAC model data loader
tasks.description: Load real HVAC model data from Buscapé (416+ SKUs) into internal/rag/models/hvac_models.go. Include: Springer/Midea, LG, Samsung, Daikin, Consul, Electrolux, Philco, Gree, Elgin.

subtasks.title: Add Springer/Midea models (AI Ecomaster, Xtreme Save Connect)
Add LG models (Dual Inverter Compact, Voice, Artcool)
Add Daikin, Consul, Electrolux, Philco, Gree, Elgin

tasks.title: Implement error code database
tasks.description: Create structured error code database based on Coolfix GitHub and hvac-troubleshoot-pro. Include 50+ error codes for Springer/Midea, LG, Samsung, Daikin, Consul/Electrolux.

tasks.title: Implement PDF parser for manuals
tasks.description: Create basic PDF parser using mupdf for extracting manual content. Extract: model, brand, error codes, procedures, tables, diagrams.

subtasks.title: Extract model/brand metadata from PDF content
Extract error codes and diagnostic procedures

tasks.title: Implement YouTube transcription pipeline
tasks.description: Create YouTube pipeline: fetch videos, transcribe with Whisper/wav2vec2, filter content (diagnostic/repair/tutorial only), then embed and index.

subtasks.title: Implement video fetcher for HVAC channels

tasks.title: Implement RAG query agent
tasks.description: Create rag_query_agent.go that routes queries to Qdrant, applies metadata filters (brand, btu, error_code), re-ranks with MiniMax, and generates responses.

subtasks.title: Implement metadata filter extraction from query

tasks.title: Implement RAG indexer agent
tasks.description: Create rag_indexer_agent.go that orchestrates the indexing pipeline: parse PDF/YouTube/forum content, chunk, embed, and upsert to Qdrant.

tasks.title: Implement error code lookup agent
tasks.description: Create error_code_agent.go that performs fast lookup of error codes by brand and code, returns structured diagnostic information.

subtasks.title: Return diagnostic steps and likely replacement

tasks.title: Index 50 pilot manuals
tasks.description: Index 50 pilot manuals from ManualsLib (Midea, LG, Samsung) to validate the pipeline. Priority: split type, inverter, 9k-24k BTU.

tasks.title: Performance validation <2s query
tasks.description: Validate that query response time is under 2 seconds for semantic search. Tune if necessary.

subtasks.title: Tune Qdrant HNSW parameters if needed

tasks.title: [CRITICAL] Wire Worker Pool in main.go
tasks.description: cmd/swarm/main.go has TODOs at lines 75-86 and 188-194. SwarmWorker and SwarmController are implemented but never instantiated. This blocks the entire swarm from processing messages.

tasks.title: Implement Gemini API calls in agents
tasks.description: classifier_agent, ranking_agent, and response_agent have callGemini() stubs that always return error. Need to implement actual Gemini API calls.

subtasks.title: classifier_agent.go:216 - Implement callGemini() for intent classification

tasks.title: Implement Qdrant vector search
tasks.description: internal/memory/qdrant_layer.go has placeholder at line 44. Hybrid search not implemented.

subtasks.title: qdrant_layer.go:44 - Implement hybrid search (dense + sparse + RRF)
Add metadata filters (brand, model, btu, error_code)

tasks.title: Implement SQLite sync
tasks.description: internal/memory/sync.go has placeholder at line 114. SQLite sync every 60s not implemented.

subtasks.title: Implement WAL table writes (users, billing_events, audit_log, conversations)

tasks.title: Fix WhatsApp sender implementation
tasks.description: internal/whatsapp/sender.go is stub. Also intake_agent.go:251 has media download placeholder.

subtasks.title: sender.go - Implement WhatsApp Cloud API send
intake_agent.go:251 - Implement media download via Graph API

tasks.title: Configure Stripe Price IDs
tasks.description: internal/billing/plans.go lines 53-54 have empty Stripe Price IDs. Billing checkout will fail.

subtasks.title: Update plans.go to read from env vars

tasks.title: Create Docker Compose deployment files
tasks.description: SPEC-007 requires docker-compose files in deployments/ directory. Currently no Docker configuration exists.

subtasks.title: Add health checks to all services

tasks.title: Add cache TTL to RAG agent
tasks.description: rag_agent.go:136-142 sets cache without TTL. Memory leak potential.

tasks.title: Fix error handling issues
tasks.description: Multiple error handling issues identified in code review.

subtasks.title: intake_agent.go:203 - Log media download failures instead of silent fail
controller.go:44 - Reduce scheduler tick from 10ms to 100ms
apps/api/errorHandler.ts:120 - Use request.log.error() instead of console.log
apps/api/users.trpc.ts:25 - Use TRPCError instead of plain Error

tasks.title: Add missing unit tests
tasks.description: Several modules lack test coverage per code review.

tasks.title: [CRITICAL] Wire RAG Agent in main.go
tasks.description: cmd/swarm/main.go:242 - rag := agents.NewRAGAgent(nil, nil, nil) returns nil. Wire with real redisClient, qdrantClient, geminiClient.

subtasks.title: Verify qdrantClient and geminiClient exist in main.go
Wire RAG agent with real clients
Remove TODO: wire RAG agent comment

tasks.title: [CRITICAL] Wire Ranking Agent in main.go
tasks.description: cmd/swarm/main.go:245 - ranking := agents.NewRankingAgent(nil, nil) returns nil. Wire with real redisClient, minimaxClient.

Remove TODO: wire ranking agent comment

tasks.title: [CRITICAL] Wire Billing Agent in main.go
tasks.description: cmd/swarm/main.go:266 - billing := agents.NewBillingAgent(nil, nil) returns nil. Wire with real redisClient, stripeClient.

subtasks.title: Wire Billing agent with real clients
Remove TODO: wire billing agent comment

tasks.title: [HIGH] Implement Condition Evaluation in graph.go
tasks.description: AddConditionalSkip stores targets but doesn't evaluate when node completes. Implement EvaluateConditions() in ExecutionGraph.

subtasks.title: Add OutputField and TriggerValue to Condition struct
Call EvaluateConditions in controller.go when node completes
Add test for access_control=block skip behavior

tasks.title: [MEDIUM] Create Circuit Breaker Stub
tasks.description: internal/circuitbreaker/breaker.go is empty. Implement 3-state circuit breaker (closed/open/half-open) for Gemini/Qdrant protection.

tasks.title: [MEDIUM] Create tasks.json and queue_schema.json
tasks.description: configs/tasks.json and configs/queue_schema.json are missing. Create from blueprint section 7.2 and 7.4.

tasks.title: [CRITICAL] Stripe v80 → v84: Backup Branch
tasks.description: Create backup branch before migrating stripe-go. Branch: backup/pre-migration-stripe-v84

subtasks.title: Create backup branch from current HEAD

tasks.description: Update go.mod from stripe-go/v80 to stripe-go/v84. Run: go get github.com/stripe/stripe-go/v84@v84.2.0

Replace stripe.Key = apiKey with sc := stripe.NewClient(apiKey)
Update imports from v80 to v84

tasks.description: Review internal/billing/webhook.go for stripe client usage. Signature verification uses local hmacSHA256 - no stripe dependency.

Verify hmacSHA256 signature verification is independent

tasks.title: [HIGH] Stripe v80 → v84: Import Cleanup
tasks.description: Verify no stripe-go/v80 imports remain after migration. grep -r stripe-go/v80 --include="*.go"

tasks.title: [CRITICAL] Stripe v80 → v84: Build Verification
tasks.description: Verify go build ./... passes after migration

tasks.description: Run go test ./internal/billing/... -v to verify all billing tests pass

tasks.title: [HIGH] Stripe v80 → v84: Integration Tests
tasks.description: Run tests/integration/billing_test.go or create if missing. Verify checkout flow with test mode.

subtasks.title: Update test client pattern to stripe.NewClient()

tasks.title: [HIGH] Stripe v80 → v84: Migration Report
tasks.description: Document all changes, test results, issues found. Update SPEC-030 with final status.

tasks.title: [HIGH] Implement Semantic Chunking for HVAC Manuals
tasks.description: Implement chunking semântico para manuais HVAC: 512 tokens (error codes), 1024 tokens (specs), overlap 15%. Split por seção (ERROR_CODES, SPECS, INSTALLATION, TROUBLESHOOTING). Metadata: brand, model, btu, error_code, page_ref.

subtasks.title: Implement 512-token chunking for error code tables
Add 15% overlap (75 tokens error, 150 tokens specs)
Add metadata: brand, model, btu, error_code, page_ref

tasks.title: [HIGH] Create Whitelist/Blacklist PostgreSQL Schema
tasks.description: Criar schema PostgreSQL para whitelist/blacklist de manuais. Table hvac_model_whitelist (brand, model, btu, codes aceitos) e hvac_manual_blacklist (hash, reason, rejected_at). Existing BrandModels in hvac_models.go como source.

subtasks.title: Create table hvac_model_whitelist (brand, model, btu, codes)

tasks.title: [HIGH] Implement qwen2.5-vl Visual Verification
tasks.description: Implementar verificação visual de manuais via qwen2.5-vl. Render PDF → base64 PNG → call litellm/qwen2.5-vl → JSON response com document_type, has_diagnostic_content, confidence. Rejeitar manuais falsos/duplicados.

subtasks.title: Implement blacklist logic for fake manuals

tasks.title: [MEDIUM] Implement YouTube Learning Pipeline
tasks.description: Implementar pipeline de aprendizado de vídeos HVAC. YouTube API → fetch captions → semantic chunking (512 tokens) → Qdrant index. Filtrar: canal técnico, não promocional, diagnóstico/reparo.

subtasks.title: Implement YouTube search for HVAC diagnostic
Implement semantic chunking with timestamp preservation

tasks.title: [HIGH] Implement WhatsApp DEV Simulation
tasks.description: Implementar simulação completa no terminal. CLI tool ./bin/whatsapp-simulator, Redis LPUSH para queue intake, log all messages. SIMULATE_WHATSAPP=true + DEV_MODE=true.

tasks.title: [HIGH] Create Error Codes Database
tasks.description: Criar database completo de códigos de erro inverter. Universal: E1-E9, F0-F9, P0-P9. LG: CH01-CH99. Samsung: E101-E502. Daikin: A1-C99. Midea/Springer/Consul: E01-F45. Fields: code, description, user_fixable, diagnostic_steps.

tasks.title: [HIGH] Implement Response Refinement Engine
tasks.description: Implementar refinement de resposta com confiança calibrada. Confidence thresholds: high(>=0.85), medium(0.60-0.84), low(0.40-0.59), none(<0.40). PT-BR phrases per band. Compact format (max 4096 chars, 3 bullets).

subtasks.title: Add PT-BR response templates per band
Implement compact format (3 bullets, source citation)

tasks.title: [MEDIUM] MiniMax Embedding Quality Upgrade
tasks.description: Verificar se embedding-256 MiniMax é suficiente ou migrar para 1024d bge-m3 local. Test: query 'E8 Springer' vs 'CH10 LG' separation. Decision: MiniMax ou local Ollama (bge-m3).

subtasks.title: Implement comparison test (E8 Springer vs CH10 LG)

tasks.title: [HIGH] PDF Parser Integration with mupdf
tasks.description: Integrar mupdf para extração de manuais. Use github.com/ArtifexSoftware/mupdf-go. Extract text + tables, section detection via heuristics, model/brand extraction from filename + headers.

subtasks.title: Extract model/brand from filename and headers
Return structured JSON with pages and sections

tasks.title: [HIGH] RAG Quality Evaluation
tasks.description: Implementar métricas de qualidade. Test set: 50 perguntas de diagnóstico. Metrics: MRR (primary), HitRate@5, Faithfulness. LLM-as-judge. Continuous improvement loop with user feedback.

subtasks.title: Create test set with 50 diagnostic questions

tasks.title: [HIGH] Implement Semantic Cache (Redis)
tasks.description: Criar internal/rag/cache.go com cache semântico Redis. Query hash → cached response (TTL 24h). Evita re-embed + re-LLM para queries idênticas. Target: ~70% cache hit rate.

subtasks.title: Add CachedResponse struct com response, source_chunk_ids, confidence

tasks.title: [HIGH] Implement BullMQ Job Patterns
tasks.description: Criar internal/rag/jobs.go com padrões BullMQ (Redis Lists + Hash). Job states: waiting, active, completed, failed, delayed. Suporta retries (3x), backoff exponential, DLQ.

subtasks.title: Create Job struct e JobState constants
Implement AddJob() com Redis Hash + List
Implement moveToDLQ() para jobs com erro após retries

tasks.title: [HIGH] Implement OpenTelemetry Spans
tasks.description: Criar internal/rag/otel.go com wrappers de spans. Trace hierarchy: rag.query → cache.lookup, embed.query, qdrant.search, llm.response. Usar OTEL SDK disponível no monorepo.

tasks.title: [HIGH] Implement Chunk Quality Score
tasks.description: Criar internal/rag/quality.go com scoring via qwen2.5-vl. Score 0-1 no ChunkResult. Thresholds: ≥0.8 high, 0.5-0.8 medium, <0.5 low. Score armazenado no payload Qdrant.

subtasks.title: Create QualityScore struct e threshold constants
Integrar em rag_indexer_agent.go para score após chunking

tasks.title: [MEDIUM] Integrate Semantic Cache in rag_query_agent
tasks.description: Modificar internal/agents/rag_query_agent.go para usar semantic cache. Cache hit → retorna cached response. Cache miss → procede normal flow.

subtasks.title: Implement cache lookup no início de Execute()
Implement cache Set() após response generation

tasks.title: [MEDIUM] Integrate Job Queue in rag_indexer_agent
tasks.description: Modificar internal/agents/rag_indexer_agent.go para usar job queue. Indexar PDF → AddJob('index_pdf') → ProcessJobs() com retries e DLQ.

subtasks.title: Add DLQ handling para jobs failed

tasks.title: [MEDIUM] Add RAGConfig to env vars
tasks.description: Criar internal/rag/config.go com RAGConfig struct. Variables: RAG_CACHE_TTL (24h), RAG_JOB_MAX_RETRIES (3), RAG_JOB_BACKOFF_MS (1000), RAG_QUALITY_THRESHOLD (0.5), OTEL_ENABLED (true).

subtasks.title: Create RAGConfig struct com env tags
Load config em rag_indexer_agent.go e rag_query_agent.go

meta.notes: Added SPEC-060 HVAC RAG Enterprise Pipeline: 7 tasks (60-66). Semantic Cache Redis, BullMQ Jobs, OpenTelemetry Spans, Chunk Quality Score. Cleanup: archived SPEC-005/031/033, refactored SPEC-026 to 164 lines.
